name: shipments-bulk-actions
description: Shipmnts Bulk Action Platform — scalable CRM bulk updates

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @shipments/api" "npm run dev -w @shipments/worker"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @shipments/api" "npm run dev -w @shipments/worker" "npm run dev -w @shipments/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @shipments/shared && npm run build -w @shipments/web
